posts.headline:
The market
doesn't wait
for humans.
posts.subtext: While you hesitate, AI is already in position. CryptoMentor trades for you — 24/7, zero emotion, no experience needed.

posts.headline:
What does
a candle
tell you?
posts.subtext: Every candle holds 4 secrets: Open, High, Low, Close. Master reading them and you read the market's emotion.

points.label: Green candle
points.desc: Buyers won — price closed higher than it opened.

points.label: Red candle
points.desc: Sellers won — price closed lower than it opened.

points.label: Long wick
points.desc: Price was rejected — strong reversal signal.

posts.headline:
Support &
Resistance:
the market's
memory.
posts.subtext: Price remembers where it bounced before. These levels are where battles between buyers and sellers repeat.

points.label: Support
points.desc: A floor where buyers step in and stop the fall.

points.label: Resistance
points.desc: A ceiling where sellers push price back down.

points.label: Role reversal
points.desc: Broken support becomes new resistance, and vice versa.

posts.headline:
Your bot
trades while
you live.
posts.subtext: Set it once. CryptoMentor handles entries, exits, and risk management automatically — connected directly to your exchange.

posts.headline:
Most traders
lose not from
bad entries —
but bad exits.
posts.subtext: Knowing when to cut losses is more valuable than knowing when to enter. Protect your capital first.

points.label: 1% Rule
points.desc: Never risk more than 1% of your capital on a single trade.

points.label: Risk/Reward
points.desc: Only take trades where potential gain is 2x the potential loss.

points.label: Stop Loss
points.desc: Set it before you enter. Never move it against you.

posts.headline:
FOMO has
wiped more
accounts than
bad analysis.
posts.subtext: Fear of Missing Out makes you buy tops and sell bottoms. The market will always have another opportunity.

points.label: FOMO trigger
points.desc: Price pumps fast — you chase it at the top.

points.label: The result
points.desc: You buy high, panic sells low. Classic retail trap.

points.label: The fix
points.desc: Have a plan. If you missed it, wait for the next setup.

posts.headline:
Professional
AI trading.
Zero cost.
posts.subtext: No subscription. No hidden fees. No credit card. CryptoMentor AutoTrade is completely free — because everyone deserves a fair shot at the market.

posts.headline:
The trend
is your only
true friend.
posts.subtext: Trading against the trend is like swimming against a current. Identify it first, then trade with it.

points.label: Uptrend
points.desc: Higher highs and higher lows — buyers in control.

points.label: Downtrend
points.desc: Lower highs and lower lows — sellers dominate.

points.label: Sideways
points.desc: No clear direction — wait or trade the range.

posts.headline:
Leverage
amplifies
everything —
including losses.
posts.subtext: 10x leverage means 10% move wipes your account. Most beginners learn this the hard way. You don't have to.

points.label: What it does
points.desc: Multiplies your buying power — and your risk.

points.label: The danger
points.desc: A 10x position gets liquidated at just 10% against you.

points.label: Safe approach
points.desc: Start with 2-3x max until you're consistently profitable.

posts.headline:
AI doesn't
panic.
AI doesn't
hesitate.
posts.subtext: Human traders lose to emotion. AI executes the same strategy perfectly, every single time — at 0.1 second speed.

posts.headline:
Price moves
mean nothing
without volume.
posts.subtext: Volume is the fuel behind price movement. A breakout with high volume is real. Without volume, it's a trap.

points.label: High volume breakout
points.desc: Strong conviction — the move is likely to continue.

points.label: Low volume breakout
points.desc: Weak move — likely to reverse (fake breakout).

points.label: Volume divergence
points.desc: Price rising but volume falling = warning sign.

posts.headline:
One bot.
Multiple
exchanges.
posts.subtext: Start with Bitunix today. Binance, Bybit, and TokCrypto coming soon. One platform to rule your entire portfolio.

posts.headline:
Every market
goes through
4 phases.
Know them.
posts.subtext: Accumulation, markup, distribution, markdown. Understanding where we are in the cycle changes everything.

points.label: Accumulation
points.desc: Smart money buys quietly. Price is flat and boring.

points.label: Markup
points.desc: Price rises. Retail starts to notice and FOMO in.

points.label: Distribution
points.desc: Smart money sells to retail at the top.

posts.headline:
Moving
averages:
the simplest
edge.
posts.subtext: MA shows you the average price over time. When price is above MA, trend is up. Below MA, trend is down. Simple.

points.label: MA 20
points.desc: Short-term trend — good for swing trades.

points.label: MA 200
points.desc: Long-term trend — the big picture direction.

points.label: Golden Cross
points.desc: MA 50 crosses above MA 200 = strong buy signal.

posts.headline:
You don't
need to know
how to trade
to profit.
posts.subtext: CryptoMentor was built for people who want results without spending years learning charts. The AI does the analysis. You collect the results.
